title: Docs: import vantt's decision record 0024, adapt AGENTS block + architecture/contracts docs to the adopted dispatcher
action: Per DA7 (decision 30606de4), land the knowledge layer for the adopted dispatcher. Runs AFTER hia-2 so the prose can truthfully say the registry includes cells.update. (1) Import docs/decisions/0024-harness-cross-pollination-analysis.md verbatim from ref pr-1-vantt (`git show pr-1-vantt:docs/decisions/0024-harness-cross-pollination-analysis.md`) — vantt's design record, authorship/attribution preserved; append a short 'Adoption note (2026-07-12)' section at the end stating it was adopted from PR #1 with 0.1.26 adaptations (cells.update, status re-sync, gitignored manifest-hash, verb-bijection test) and scope frozen to the 4 legacy helpers (5 newer helpers = follow-up PBI). (2) Port the PR's hunks for skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md, docs/02-architecture.md, and docs/07-contracts.md (obtain with `git diff main...pr-1-vantt -- <file>`), ADAPTING prose to adopted reality: registry includes cells.update; dispatcher covers exactly the 4 legacy helpers; the manifest command is written in its RUNNABLE form `node .bee/bin/bee.mjs --help --json` (the PR's AGENTS.block.md already uses exactly this form — never the bare shorthand 'bee --help --json', no bare `bee` binary exists); do not import any claim only true on vantt's branch (his cell/test counts, 'merged cleanly' claims, his state bookkeeping). The architecture section must name command-registry.mjs as the single source of truth for the command surface. (3) Apply the identical AGENTS-block edit inside AGENTS.md's BEE markers. IMPORTANT (plan-checker verified): no standing test asserts AGENTS.md's block equals the template block — test_onboard_bee.mjs only checks marker presence and idempotency — so YOU must diff the two blocks yourself after editing and make them byte-equal; state in the cell report that you did. (4) Add a one-line reading-map pointer for the dispatcher (where bee.mjs/command-registry.mjs live, spec-before-code note).

truths: docs/decisions/0024 exists, credits vantt, and carries the adoption note
AGENTS.md BEE block and templates/AGENTS.block.md carry the same dispatcher/manifest section
no imported prose asserts vantt-branch-only facts (his .bee state, his test counts, 'merged cleanly' claims)
prohibitions: no PR comment / no PR close from this cell (outward-facing, user-confirmed only, DA7)
no docs/history/ or plans/ files imported from pr-1-vantt

verify: test -f docs/decisions/0024-harness-cross-pollination-analysis.md && grep -Fq 'bee.mjs --help --json' skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md && grep -Fq 'bee.mjs --help --json' AGENTS.md && grep -Fq 'bee.mjs' docs/specs/reading-map.md && grep -Fq 'command-registry.mjs' docs/02-architecture.md && grep -Fq 'bee.mjs --help --json' docs/07-contracts.md && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs

trace.outcome: Imported vantt's docs/decisions/0024 verbatim with an appended Adoption note; ported and adapted the PR's AGENTS.block.md, docs/02-architecture.md, and docs/07-contracts.md dispatcher hunks to adopted 0.1.26 reality (cells.update in the registry, runnable node .bee/bin/bee.mjs --help --json form, command-registry.mjs named as single source of truth, no vantt-branch-only claims); applied the identical AGENTS-block edit inside AGENTS.md's BEE markers and confirmed byte-equality by diff; added a one-line docs/specs/reading-map.md pointer for the dispatcher. Also fixed a blocking, unrelated pre-existing test gap (hia-1's .gitignore pattern list vs test_onboard_bee.mjs's hardcoded hash-parity list) so the cell's full verify suite could pass.

deviations.what: Added '.bee/manifest-hash.json' to the hardcoded GITIGNORE_PATTERNS_FOR_HASH list in skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs (the 9f hash-tie test), matching the GITIGNORE_BLOCK_PATTERNS array onboard_bee.mjs already renders (hia-1 added the 10th entry there but the test's independent hash-parity list was left at 9).
deviations.why: The cell's own verify command runs the full test_onboard_bee.mjs suite; without this fix it failed on an assertion unrelated to hia-4's docs deliverables ('managed.gitignore_block ties to an independently-reconstructed sha256...'). Confirmed pre-existing (not caused by any hia-4 edit) via git-stash A/B: same failure with hia-4's doc changes stashed out. Root cause traced to hia-1's commit (ce545fe) adding the pattern to onboard_bee.mjs's live generator without updating this test's separately-hardcoded expected list — a one-line, mechanical, no-behavior-change parity fix, reserved before write, no conflicts.
